summary: Comprehensive testing of Mira OS service flow and soul score system completed. Backend tests: 16/16 passed (100%). Frontend tests: Both desktop (1920px) and mobile (375px) service flows work correctly. Service flow creates all required entries (Notification → Ticket → Inbox). Soul scores are stored and displayed correctly in dashboard.

minor.issue: pet_soul_score not included in main chat endpoint response (only in /os/understand-with-products)
Treats query routes to 'celebrate' pillar instead of 'Food' pillar - intent classification may need tuning

issues: Page loads successfully on both mobile and desktop

action_items: Consider adding pet_soul_score to main /api/mira/chat response for real-time UI updates
Tune intent classification for treats/food queries - currently routes to 'celebrate' instead of 'Food'
critical_code_review_comments: UNIFIED FLOW WORKING: Verified Notification → Ticket → Inbox creation in logs
SOUL SCORE WORKING: Verified scores increment (Mojo 50%, Luna 53.1%, Lola 20.4%, etc.)
SERVICE DESK TICKETS: Created with proper pillar assignment (care, celebrate, advisory)
CHANNEL INTAKES: Created with proper metadata and tags
ADMIN NOTIFICATIONS: Created with proper urgency and customer info
MEMBER NOTIFICATIONS: Created for user feedback (MNOTIF-XXXXXXXX)
Mobile responsive: Service flow works at 375px width
Desktop: Service flow works at 1920px width
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service flow fully tested. Unified flow creates: admin_notifications, service_desk_tickets, channel_intakes. Soul scores stored in pets collection (overall_score field). Main chat endpoint at /api/mira/chat expects 'message' field (not 'input'). Test scenarios chips work on /mira-demo page. Pet selector shows all 7 pets with soul scores.
rca_of_the_issue: No critical issues found. Minor: pet_soul_score not returned in main chat response because it's only added in the /os/understand-with-products endpoint, not the main /chat endpoint.
